So in terms of scalability, we needed to make sure that we had enough resources when available.
So what we did was we turned on S3 replication between two regions. When region one ran out of compute
resources, we could use CloudFormation to spin up another cluster in a second region which gave us
the compute resources that we needed. So with this architecture, we were able to scale when resources ran out in one region.
